name: spreadsheets
description: Create, edit, analyze, visualize, render, and export spreadsheets, Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets-ready workbooks in agent.

interface.longDescription: Create, edit, inspect, render, verify, and export XLSX, CSV, and TSV spreadsheets locally, including local XLSX authoring for native Google Sheets handoff. Use Spreadsheets when the durable output or target is a spreadsheet, workbook, sheet, Google Sheet, or CSV file. Use Excel Live Control for working on a spreadsheet open in Microsoft Excel app, through the spreadsheet add-in.
defaultPrompt: Create a spreadsheet to analyze this company's financials
Create a corporate expense report template for my company
Take this bank statement CSV and create a full spreadsheet to analyze my transactions
